title: The Salt Line — Salt & Toy
atmospheric_profile: extreme tactile close-up: weathered wood encrusted with thick white salt crystals, tangled blue fishing net, cracked child's toy boat half-buried in salt
quality_notes: Masterful micro-detail. The salt crystals, net, and toy boat create a complete story of loss and reclamation. Hyper-tactile and emotionally heavy. Highest quality immersive still.
